name: Maxwell Fleming
subtitle: Peer Support Worker • future foster carer • occasional menace to boring websites
tagline: Warm human. Good chats. Strong opinions. Dog supervision always active.
proBio: Peer Support Worker with experience in mental health and community support across NSW. Strong focus on communication, lived experience advocacy, and building trust with clients. Background in business operations and accommodation management, bringing a practical and people-focused approach to every role.

moods: Running on vibes, instinct, and whatever snack is closest.
Currently available for chats, caffeine, and avoiding nonsense.
Doing my best. Some assembly clearly required.
Emotionally supported by a whippet and mild delusion.
Polite on the outside. Internally writing a strongly worded memo.
Looking calm. Absolutely not calm. Great posture though.
Open for business-ish. Closed for nonsense.
Holding it together like a zip tie in a cyclone.
defaultMood: Today's setting: professionally held together with a suspicious amount of duct tape.

gracieModal.title: Meet Gracie 🐶
lines: Hi, I'm Gracie. I supervise everything.
He thinks he runs this site. He doesn't.
Whippet. Fashion icon. Emotional support noodle. Full-time household manager.

footer: Made with ✨, actual personality, and very firm anti-boring beliefs.
